summary.text:
The task is to search X for substantive, recent posts about: AI agents that transact onchain — agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles. Date range: 2026-07-12 to 2026-07-13. Retur...First, the date range is 2026-07-12 to 2026-07-13. Current date is July 13, 2026, so yesterday and today.

I need to search X for posts matching the criteria.

I have tools: x_keyword_search and x_semantic_search.

output.input: {"query":"(\"AI agent\" OR \"AI agents\" OR \"agent payments\" OR \"AI-judged bounties\" OR \"decentralized AI oracles\" OR \"AI oracle\") (onchain OR on-chain OR blockchain OR crypto) since:2026-07-12 until:2026-07-14","limit":"10","mode":"Latest"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

output.input: {"query":"AI agents transacting onchain, agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles","limit":"10","from_date":"2026-07-12","to_date":"2026-07-13","min_score_threshold":"0.2"}
output.name: x_semantic_search

**4.**  
**@MinusWells**  
Full text: 🚀 sui:native is on the verge of owning agentic payments. Just shattered records with a live AI agent experiment hitting over 6 million TPS (6,086,766 peak @ 400ms TTF).   

@EmanAbio tried to warn us. It's not theory. It’s real autonomous agents trading and transacting at machine speed.   

@SuiNetwork  is purpose built for the agent economy: lightning fast finality, programmable payments that feel native to AI, and the infrastructure for agents to pay, settle, and collaborate autonomously.   

Key edge?   

Transactions that can be effectively free at scale (ultra low gas) plus private by design options with scoped authority and verifiable on chain auditability. No more human checkout friction. Agents handle intent, authorization, and execution seamlessly.   

While others play catch up and rationalize not having smart contracts, Sui is delivering the trust layer for agentic commerce: machine native primitives, stablecoin rails, and multi agent systems ready for prime time.   

The future of payments isn’t human to human.   

It’s agent to agent. And SUI is positioning to power it all. sui:native #SuiNetwork #Agentic #AIagents  
Date posted: Sun, 12 Jul 2026 22:09:13 GMT  
Engagement: Likes=5, Reposts=0, Replies=1

**6.**  
**@jaouad2d**  
Full text: AI agents will soon manage transactions worth trillions.  

Intelligence alone won’t cut it when those deals lead to differing interpretations.  

@GenLayer steps up as the adjudication layer built for this.  

Through its network of AI validators, agents can use contracts that:    

  • Let multiple independent models review the situation on their own    
  • Build consensus from diverse reasoning on the facts and context    
  • Produce a clear outcome agents can trust and act upon quickly  

The result:  

Disagreements between agents get handled at machine speed through reasoned judgment instead of rigid logic.  

The economy built around AI agents isn’t just about quick execution.    

It requires this kind of trusted resolution when views don’t perfectly align.
